titleStmt.title: Letter from Thomas Kirkpatrick to the Registrar of the Branch Medical Council, 5 May 1917
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: Thomas Kirkpatrick

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p: From 1910 until 1954 Thomas Percy Kirkpatrick (1869-1954) served as the registrar for the Royal College of Physicians of Ireland. He also served as the general secretary of the Royal Academy of Medicine in Ireland. He took a particular interest in what were then termed venereal diseases; to encourage his patients (many of whom were prostitutes) to attend, he held a clinic for women at a discreet early morning hour to facilitate anonymity.

msIdentifier.repository: Royal College of Physicians of Ireland

correspAction.persName: The Registrar of the Branch Medical Council

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
RCPI/2/3/2/13/232 5th May 17. The Registrar,
Branch Medical Council,
Dublin. Dear Sir, At a meeting of the President and Fellows of this College
held yesterday the 4th inst., the following were admitted to
the Licenses in Medicine and Midwifery of the College:-
George Gordon Crymble Adams, 9 Adelaide Road, Dublin.
Joseph Patrick Brennan, Delbrook Park, Dundrum.
Moses Briscoe, 9 Adelaide Road, Dublin,
Edward Marshall Tate Crymble, Ballybranagh, Downpatrick.
Ignatius Benedict Culnano, St. Andrews, Temple Rd., Milltown.
Francis, Daly, Kells, Co. Meath.
John Joseph Delany, 68 Wellington, Road, Dublin,
Maurice Dockrell, Camolin, Monkstown.
Joseph Patrick Doyle, Rosbercon Castle, New Ross,
Herbert Graham, Main Street, Bailieboro, Co.Cavan.
James Holland, Athy, Co. Kildare.
Henry Newtown Kilronan Kevin, Aughnacloy, Co.Tyrone.
Michael Patrick Lee, Clifden, Co. Galway.
Michael Patrick Leonard, Ringwood, Newcastle West,Co. Limerick.
Edward Hamilton Lloyd-Dodd, Crumlin Road, Belfast.
John Alphonsus MacSweeny, 166 Marlborough Road.
Myril Murray, St. Michaels, Sandycove.
George William Pope, Careystown, Whitegate, Co. Cork.
abel Murray-Prior, Marroon Boonah, Queensland.
George Charles Frederick Ree, Esmore Hall, Carrickmacross.
Arthur Rundle Soady, 1 Morehamptom Road.
ugh Reginald Wright, Ulverston, Dalkey.
ames Phillip Sheridan, Watergate Street, Navan. Yours faithfully,
